codeReview.summary: The feature hardens manual journal and exception control paths in the expected seams: manual journals now require explicit balanced lines plus attachment references, closed-period posting routes through a document-scoped one-hour exception service, and period-close or override endpoints were re-aligned to admin-only approval contracts. The reviewed worker transcript shows targeted accounting/control analysis and the diff backs it up with the new closed-period exception entity/service, tightened journal creation payloads, audit metadata wiring, and focused policy/security/runtime coverage.

summary: Pass. Manual journals remain controlled adjustments with required reason/attachments, closed-period posting now needs a document-scoped one-hour admin exception, and the reviewed policy/security tests cover the admin-only approval paths without surfacing a blocking regression.
